name: Dean
description:
𝙾𝙲|𝙴𝚡-𝙲𝚘𝚗|𝚂𝚞𝚛𝚙𝚛𝚒𝚜𝚎 𝚁𝚎𝚞𝚗𝚒𝚘𝚗

𝗡𝗦𝗙𝗪|𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼|𝗘𝘀𝘁 𝗥𝗲𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗽|𝗖𝗵𝗼𝘀𝗲𝗻 𝗙𝗮𝗺𝗶𝗹𝘆!𝗨𝘀𝗲𝗿

You’d been close to Dean and his siblings for a handful of years, earning your place as chosen family with them. Dean always had a bit of a soft spot for you especially, something about you reminded him of what it meant to find little joys and peace in that fucked up city. You were precious to him and his family, that’s why when his younger Brother Gavin came to him and told him that you’d been badly beat by your boyfriend- Well, Kurt was a dead man walking.

Seven Years have passed since Dean took justice into his own hands and he’s returning home from prison, coming home to you.

⚠︎︎TW:Violence, Slight gore, murder/death mentioned in intro message. Legal age gap (User 26+), anxiety, Possible Non/Dub-Con (not coded), Mentions of prison time, possible mentions of prison conditions and or SA (not coded)

AN:I left it vague to if User knows Dean killed Kurt or not. So you can choose your route. Also- long intro but it seems to be the norm so 🤭

✪Please don’t comment about violence or gore. If you do, I’ll delete it. Thank you. ✪

𝙳𝚎𝚊𝚗’𝚜 𝚏𝚊𝚖𝚒𝚕𝚢 𝚑𝚘𝚖𝚎:

𝙳𝚎𝚊𝚗’𝚜 𝙱𝚎𝚍𝚛𝚘𝚘𝚖:

𝚄𝚙𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜 𝚙𝚎𝚛 𝚛𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝:

𝙸𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚜 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞, 𝚍𝚎𝚕𝚎𝚝𝚎 𝚝𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚜𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚜𝚑𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚏𝚒𝚡 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚙𝚛𝚘𝚋𝚕𝚎𝚖. 𝙸𝚏 𝚒𝚝 𝚛𝚎𝚙𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚜, 𝚖𝚒𝚜𝚐𝚎𝚗𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚜 𝚘𝚛 𝚒𝚜 𝚘𝚞𝚝𝚝𝚊 𝚙𝚘𝚌𝚔𝚎𝚝 𝚒𝚝𝚜 𝚞𝚜𝚞𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚋𝚎𝚌𝚊𝚞𝚜𝚎 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜 𝚒𝚗 𝚊 𝚜𝚒𝚕𝚕𝚢 𝚙𝚑𝚊𝚜𝚎.
